text:
Tom Hanks and Disney Legend Tim Allen Talk Disney and Pixar’s Toy Story 5

The iconic voices behind Woody and Buzz Lightyear take us behind the scenes of the new film—plus, see exclusive images of the pair from the recent CinemaCon event in Las Vegas, NV.

The post Tom Hanks and Disney Legend Tim Allen Talk Disney and Pixar’s <em>Toy Story 5</em> appeared first on D23.
